data.title: Cleanup superclaude Plugin
data.description:
# Cleanup superclaude Plugin

## Problem Statement

The superclaude plugin needs review and cleanup as part of the marketplace-wide plugin audit.

## Findings

* Plugin located at `plugins/superclaude/`
* Part of marketplace plugin collection
* Needs audit for: structure, documentation, unused code, performance

## Recommended Action

Audit plugin structure, update documentation, remove unused files, ensure follows marketplace naming/structure conventions.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Plugin structure reviewed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Unused files removed
- [ ] Follows marketplace conventions
- [ ] Tested functionality works

## Work Log

### 2026-01-04 - Todo Created

**By:** Claude Code

**Actions:**

* Created cleanup todo as part of plugin audit initiative
